cases.title: After column + space suggests clause keywords only

expected.comment: Whitespace after column = selection complete. AS for alias, FROM to continue query building.

cases.title: After unqualified column + space + prefix: suggest ONLY matching keywords

expected.comment: Whitespace after column = selection complete. With prefix, show ONLY matching keywords.

cases.title: After unqualified column + space + prefix A: suggest AS only

expected.comment: Whitespace after column = selection complete. Prefix A matches AS keyword only.

cases.title: After column + comma suggests next-item (columns + functions)

expected.comment: Comma = next-item rules. With no scope and no prefix, expect functions.

cases.title: After qualified column + space: suggest ONLY keywords, NOT functions

expected.comment: Whitespace after qualified column = selection complete. Contextual keyword first, then plain keywords.

cases.title: After qualified column + space + prefix: suggest ONLY matching keywords

expected.comment: Whitespace after qualified column = selection complete. Even with prefix, show ONLY keywords (not functions/columns).

cases.title: After qualified column + space + prefix W: no valid suggestions

expected.comment: After a qualified select item, WHERE is not valid in this position. No suggestions.

cases.title: After qualified column + comma: suggest columns and functions

expected.comment: Comma = next item. Previous item is qualified, so suggest columns from the same qualifier even with no scope/prefix.

cases.title: After qualified column + comma + prefix: suggest matching same-table columns + functions

expected.comment: Comma + prefix. Previous item qualified, so suggest same-table columns starting with 'p' + functions.

cases.title: VIRTUAL_SCOPED via CURRENT_TABLE + comma: suggest current table columns (qualified) + functions

expected.comment: Comma = next-item. CURRENT_TABLE creates virtual scope. Columns MUST be qualified (table.column) when no FROM/JOIN exists.

cases.title: VIRTUAL_SCOPED via CURRENT_TABLE + whitespace: suggest contextual keyword + plain keywords

expected.comment: Whitespace after column = selection complete. CURRENT_TABLE creates virtual scope. Contextual keyword FROM {table} first, then plain keywords.
